title: Using hardcoded IP addresses is security sensitive
description: Hardcoded IP addresses can be a security risk as they can't be easily updated and may contain sensitive information.
message: A hardcoded IP address has been found.
recommendation: Consider using a configuration file or environment variable to store IP addresses.

noncompliant.code:
import socket
server = socket.socket(socket.AF_INET, socket.SOCK_STREAM)
server.connect(('192.168.1.1', 80))
noncompliant.description: A hardcoded IP address is used for server connection.

compliant.code:
import socket
server_ip = os.environ.get('SERVER_IP')
server = socket.socket(socket.AF_INET, socket.SOCK_STREAM)
server.connect((server_ip, 80))
compliant.description: An IP address is fetched from an environment variable for server connection.

why_is_this_an_issue: Hardcoded IP addresses can be a security risk as they can't be easily updated and may contain sensitive information.
how_to_fix: Consider using a configuration file or environment variable to store IP addresses.

metadata.title: Using hardcoded IP addresses is security sensitive
